bird.name: Pygmy hanging parrot
bird.summary: The pygmy hanging parrot, red-billed hanging parrot or green hanging parrot (Loriculus exilis) is a species of parrot in the family Psittac…

locations.name: 苏拉威西岛
locations.summary: 苏拉威西岛（印尼語：Sulawesi）舊名西里伯或西里伯斯，《職方外紀》稱則勒伯（荷蘭語：Celebes），是印度尼西亚东部的一个大岛屿。 地理 苏拉威西岛按面积是世界第十一大岛，总面积为174,600平方公里，位于印度尼西亚东部，菲律宾…

locations.name: 印度尼西亚
locations.summary: 印度尼西亞共和国（印尼語：Republik Indonesia，IPA讀音：[rɛpʊblɪk ɪndɔnɛsɪa]），通稱印度尼西亞，簡稱印尼，是位于东南亚的群岛国家；由17,506個岛屿组成，是世界上最大的群島國家，疆域橫跨亞洲及大洋…

locations.name: 布顿岛
locations.summary: 布頓島（Buton，亦作Butung或Boeton），又譯布通島、布敦島、武頓島、武敦島，是印尼蘇拉威西島东南半岛以外的海島。行政上由巴务巴务市、布顿县、南布顿县、北布顿县和穆纳县管理。 歷史 在殖民時代以前，布頓島處於特尔纳特苏丹国的影…

locations.name: 卡巴那島
locations.summary: 卡巴那島是印度尼西亞的島嶼，屬於大巽他群島的一部分，位於蘇拉威西島對開的弗洛勒斯海域，由東南蘇拉威西省負責管轄，面積873平方公里，島上最高點海拔高度1,570米，島上住有約3萬名居民，主要經濟活動有種植水稻、木薯、椰子、捕魚、開發森林。…

locations.name: 沃沃尼島
locations.summary: 沃沃尼島是印度尼西亞東南蘇拉威西省的島嶼，位於蘇拉威西島東南面的班達海，南面有布頓島，島嶼面積715平方公里，擁有來自海洋和森林的天然資源。行政上归属科纳韦群岛县。

locations.name: 梅公加山脉
locations.summary: 梅公加山脉（Mekongga也叫Bingkoka）是印度尼西亚苏拉威西岛的一座山脉。山脉走势为西北东南向，位于东南半岛的西部，位于唐加西努阿山脉的西边并与之平行，行政上归属东南苏拉威西省管辖。梅公加山是一座火山，最高点海拔2,779米（9…

relations.subject: Pygmy hanging parrot
relations.evidence: Loriculus exilis is mainly endemic to Sulawesi island in Indonesia, but can also be found on many small surrounding islands such as Buton, Kabaena, and Wawonii. Although previously thought to occur only in preserved, or primary lowland forest, the species has shown some tolerance to habitat degradation. This said, it inhabits a wide range of forested areas; primary and secondary lowland and hill forests, as well as mangroves and forest edge habitats. It has been said to fly or perch anywhere from sea level up to 1,000 meters, but recent records extend its elevation range to 1,320 m in the Mekongga Mountains.{{Cite journal |last1=Berryman |first1=Alex J

relations.subject: Pygmy hanging parrot
relations.evidence: The population trends for Loriculus exilis are generally unknown, but suspected to be decreasing due to habitat loss from deforestation and trapping for the bird trade. Trapping for the pet trade is a big threat for Indonesian birds, but unfortunately has few field studies to properly gauge how serious that threat is.{{Cite journal |last1=Harris |first1=J
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Pygmy hanging parrot
relations.evidence: The population trends for Loriculus exilis are generally unknown, but suspected to be decreasing due to habitat loss from deforestation and trapping for the bird trade. Trapping for the pet trade is a big threat for Indonesian birds, but unfortunately has few field studies to properly gauge how serious that threat is.{{Cite journal |last1=Harris |first1=J
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: Pygmy hanging parrot
relations.evidence: |date=April 2017 |title=Measuring the impact of the pet trade on Indonesian birds |url=https://conbio.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/cobi.12729 |journal=Conservation Biology |language=en |volume=31 |issue=2 |pages=394–405 |doi=10.1111/cobi.12729 |pmid=28146342 |bibcode=2017ConBi..31..394H |issn=0888-8892|url-access=subscription }} This is a pressing matter to make sense of as wildlife hunting and trade networks extend all of the provinces of Sulawesi, and is undergoing rapid exploitation. Over 2,100 individuals were reported in trade records from Indonesia in 1991, though no quotas were set in subsequent years. Despite these pressures, its ability to persist in disturbed habitats may buffer it against rapid decline
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
